title: Path Traversal
description: File path construction from user input without sanitization allows attackers to traverse directory boundaries (../) and access files outside the intended scope, violating SOC2 CC6.1 (logical access controls).

finding.message: Potential path traversal via '{{token}}' in {{file}} at line {{line}}.

references: Use os.path.realpath() or Path.resolve() and verify the result is within the allowed base directory.
Maintain an explicit allowlist of accessible file paths or use a virtual file system.
Never concatenate user input directly into file paths; use a parameterized file access layer.
CWE-22 path traversal is consistently in the OWASP Top 25 Most Dangerous Software Weaknesses.
